reference_answer: Badge code B-41 identifies Mara Chen.
"MC relief" is an alias for Mara Chen during the evening shift.
Mara Chen served as the temporary dock lead during the evening shift.
Mara Chen's temporary dock lead role covered 18:00 to 22:00.
Tomas Iri remained the standing dock lead.
Mara was responsible for checking the freezer seal before the last delivery truck left.
Kai Noor supervised the truck queue.
The receiving team owned bay cart BC-2.
